subheadline: We jailbreaked Seedance 2.0 — Human face supported • No queue • Unlimited concurrency

item-1.title: Seedance 2.0 Human Face Generation
item-1.description: Every plan supports real human face video generation. Upload your portrait, toggle Mark as Real Person, and generate — no content moderation blocking your Seedance 2.0 face uploads.

item-2.title: No Queue on Any Seedance 2.0 Plan
item-2.description: Free or paid, your Seedance 2.0 generation starts immediately. No 2-hour queue like official platforms. Seedance 2 videos deliver in 5-8 minutes.

item-3.title: Unlimited Seedance 2.0 Concurrency
item-3.description: Submit multiple Seedance 2.0 generations at once. No concurrency limits on any plan — generate as many Seedance 2 videos simultaneously as you need.

item-4.title: Full Native Audio on Every Generation
item-4.description: Every Seedance 2.0 video includes native audio — dialogue with lip-sync, music, ambient sound, and effects. No separate audio production needed.

item-5.title: Native 2K Resolution Output
item-5.description: Generate Seedance 2.0 video at full 2K resolution (2048×1080). The same output quality as ByteDance's official Seedance 2.0 platform.

item-6.title: Transparent Seedance 2.0 Cost Per Video
item-6.description: Every Seedance 2.0 generation shows the credit cost before you hit Generate. No hidden fees, no surprise charges. You always know the Seedance 2 price upfront.

item-1.question: How much does one Seedance 2.0 video cost?
item-1.answer: Seedance 2.0 pricing depends on resolution and duration. A 5-second 480p Seedance 2 video costs approximately 150 credits. A 10-second 720p Seedance 2.0 video costs approximately 600 credits. The exact Seedance 2.0 cost is shown before you generate.

item-2.question: Is there a free plan for Seedance 2.0?
item-2.answer: Yes. Sign up and receive free credits — enough for your first Seedance 2.0 generation. Free accounts have the same Seedance 2.0 features: human face support, no queue, and native audio output.

item-3.question: What is the difference between monthly and annual Seedance 2.0 plans?
item-3.answer: Annual Seedance 2.0 plans save up to 40% compared to monthly pricing. You receive all credits upfront at the start of the year. If upstream changes affect Seedance 2.0 availability, remaining time is refunded pro-rata.

item-4.question: How does Seedance 2.0 pricing compare to the official platform?
item-4.answer: On Dreamina, the official Seedance 2.0 Advanced plan costs approximately $67/month. On Railway Template, Seedance 2.0 pricing starts at $9.90/month with more credits, no queue, and human face support included — features restricted or unavailable on the official Seedance 2.0 platform.

item-5.question: Can I buy Seedance 2.0 credits without a subscription?
item-5.answer: Yes. The Credit Pack is a one-time purchase of 20,000 credits with no expiration and no subscription. Use them for Seedance 2.0, Seedance 2, Veo 3.1, Seedream 4.5, or any model on the platform.

item-6.question: Do credits work across all models or just Seedance 2.0?
item-6.answer: Credits work across every model on Railway Template — Seedance 2.0, Seedance 1.5, Veo 3.1, and Seedream 4.5. One credit balance, all models. Seedance 2.0 pricing per generation is shown upfront so you can plan your budget.
